    JpaSpecificationExecutor.findBy(PredicateSpecification<T> spec, Function<? super JpaSpecificationExecutor.SpecificationFluentQuery<S>, R> queryFunction)
    Returns entities matching the given Specification applying the queryFunction that defines the query and its result type.

    Returns entities matching the given Specification applying the queryFunction that defines the query and its result type.
